description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a well-groomed beard and a distinctive facial scar above his left eyebrow. He is dressed in a collared shirt with a contrasting collar and placket, paired with fitted trousers and a belt. The shirt sleeves are rolled up to the elbows, giving a casual yet put-together appearance. His shoes are formal and closed-toe, complementing the overall smart-casual style. The figure stands upright with arms slightly extended away from the body, and his hair is closely cropped. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall build is athletic and proportional.
description: A standing adult male with a beard, facial scar, collared shirt, fitted trousers, and formal shoes in a smart-casual style.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, beard, scar, collared shirt, belt, and formal shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, ear, beard, and rolled-up shirt sleeve.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, belt, and straight posture.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, beard, and arm position.
attribute_clothing_type: collared long-sleeve shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted trousers, and a belt
